data.content: Fixed beats-view profile switching by making Knots profile updates call profile set with a deterministic target state (normalized from current raw knots state) and profile etag if-match. Added backend tests covering state forwarding and etag forwarding. Validation: bun run lint (warnings only), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test all pass; bun run build still fails on existing prerender/provider issue affecting /_not-found and /beads.
